INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93306,'Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.','type_639_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,103200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,250.0,150.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Faction','Battleship','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93307,'Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.','type_11139_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,98400000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,188.0,264.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Faction','Battleship','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93309,'Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.','type_3827_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,470000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,280.0,280.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Overseer','Battleship','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93336,'Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.','type_638_64.png',NULL,0,1040000.0,NULL,665.0,103600000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,24.0,20.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Faction','Battleship','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93337,'Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.','type_640_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,97100000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,250.0,170.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Caldari State','Battleship','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93338,'Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracised her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.','type_11898_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,470000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,250.0,40.0,80.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Angel Cartel','Battleship','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93451,'Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.','type_3706_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,100200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,264.0,188.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Gallente Federation','Battleship','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93452,'Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.','type_35816_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,105200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,170.0,250.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Amarr Empire','Battleship','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93453,'Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.','type_3825_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,470000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,180.0,170.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Overseer','Battleship','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93486,'Babout’s Thorax','Babout’s Thorax','Babout’s Thorax','Babout’s Thorax','Babout’s Thorax','Babout’s Thorax','Babout’s Thorax','Babout’s Thorax','Babout’s Thorax','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.','type_627_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11280000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,18.0,18.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Generic','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93487,'Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','Razili’s Omen Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.','type_9960_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,10850000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,18.0,0.0,18.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Amarr Empire','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93488,'Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.','type_10287_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,9830000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,18.0,18.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Serpentis','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93489,'Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.','type_629_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,12200000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,10.0,12.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Minmatar Republic','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93490,'Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.','type_9983_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11280000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,25.0,25.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Gallente Federation','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93491,'Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracized her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.','type_10018_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,9047000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,40.0,40.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Angel Cartel','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93492,'Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.','type_9984_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,9700000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,18.0,18.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Gallente Federation','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93493,'Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.','type_628_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11200000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,18.0,18.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Amarr Empire','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');

||'Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.','type_22657_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11010000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,18.0,18.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Generic','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');

||'Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.','type_594_64.png',NULL,0,29500.0,NULL,165.0,1028000.0,NULL,1,0,5098,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,10.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Gallente Federation','Frigate','faction_500021.png');

While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.','type_3762_64.png',NULL,0,29500.0,NULL,165.0,1080000.0,NULL,1,0,5098,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,10.0,10.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Minmatar Republic','Frigate','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93498,'Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.','type_603_64.png',NULL,0,29500.0,NULL,165.0,997000.0,NULL,1,0,5098,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,10.0,0.0,0.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Generic','Frigate','faction_500021.png');

||'Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, disabling the sentry.','type_16689_64.png',NULL,0,1000.0,NULL,NULL,1000.0,NULL,1,0,319,'Large Collidable Structure',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,60.0,60.0,60.0,60.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Other','Sentry','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93592,'Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Intel about operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through active participation in military activities.'||X'0a0a'
||'This intel is of value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders.'||X'0a0a'
||'Quartermaster Traders locations:'||X'0a'
||'<b>Amarr: </b>Amarr, Gergish, Tahs-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Caldari: </b>New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Gallente: </b>Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Minmatar: </b>Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.','type_93592_64.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,0.1,3837,1,27466,1194,'Special Edition Commodities',63,'Special Edition Assets',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'Quartermaster Traders locations:'||X'0a'
||'<b>Amarr: </b>Amarr, Gergish, Tahs-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Caldari: </b>New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Gallente: </b>Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Minmatar: </b>Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.','type_93593_64.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,0.1,3837,1,27467,1194,'Special Edition Commodities',63,'Special Edition Assets',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93626,'Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.','type_642_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,100200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,264.0,188.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Generic','Battleship','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93627,'Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group''s thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.','type_15327_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,103200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,250.0,150.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Minmatar Republic','Battleship','faction_500021.png');

||'Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. Now they work as a mercenary to earn the money they need to build up their own totalitarian dictatorship “the right way”, without mind control.','type_2845_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,470000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,170.0,250.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Sansha','Battleship','faction_500021.png');

If any unauthorized ships venture too close, the Master Security Node is programmed to trigger a site Lockdown.'||X'0a0a'
||'Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, aborting an active Lockdown.','type_3491_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,2700.0,10000.0,NULL,1,0,306,'Spawn Container',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Overseer','Other','faction_500021.png');

'||X'0a0a'
||'Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, rendering it inactive during a Lockdown.','type_17174_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,NULL,1000.0,NULL,1,0,319,'Large Collidable Structure',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Other','Other','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93886,'Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group''s thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.','type_9977_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,12200000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,10.0,12.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Faction','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93887,'Rurik’s Moa','Rurik’s Moa','Rurik’s Moa','Rurik’s Moa','Rurik’s Moa','Rurik’s Moa','Rurik’s Moa','Rurik’s Moa','Rurik’s Moa','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.','type_623_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11280000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,25.0,25.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Generic','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93889,'Yosuke’s Phantasm','Yosuke’s Phantasm','Yosuke’s Phantasm','Yosuke’s Phantasm','Yosuke’s Phantasm','Yosuke’s Phantasm','Yosuke’s Phantasm','Yosuke’s Phantasm','Yosuke’s Phantasm','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. Now they work as a mercenary to earn the money they need to build up their own totalitarian dictatorship “the right way”, without mind control.','type_2191_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,9600000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'Entity',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,40.0,40.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'Other','Sansha','Cruiser','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93999,'Imperial Navy Bastion Module','Imperial Navy Bastion Module','Imperial Navy Bastion Module','Imperial Navy Bastion Module','Imperial Navy Bastion Module','Imperial Navy Bastion Module','Imperial Navy Bastion Module','Imperial Navy Bastion Module','Imperial Navy Bastion Module','An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder''s siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship''s propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.'||X'0a0a'
||'This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship''s overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel''s weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges. '||X'0a0a'
||'As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.'||X'0a0a'
||'In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.'||X'0a0a'
||'Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.'||X'0a0a'
||'Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.','type_93999_64.png',NULL,1,200.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,801,4,21075,515,'Siege Module',7,'Module',80.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,33400,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94007,'Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint','','type_33401_64.png','type_33401_bpc_64.png',1,0.01,NULL,NULL,NULL,343,1,21075,516,'Siege Module Blueprint',9,'Blueprint',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(94008,'Republic Fleet Bastion Module','Republic Fleet Bastion Module','Republic Fleet Bastion Module','Republic Fleet Bastion Module','Republic Fleet Bastion Module','Republic Fleet Bastion Module','Republic Fleet Bastion Module','Republic Fleet Bastion Module','Republic Fleet Bastion Module','An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder''s siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship''s propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.'||X'0a0a'
||'This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship''s overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel''s weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges. '||X'0a0a'
||'As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.'||X'0a0a'
||'In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.'||X'0a0a'
||'Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.'||X'0a0a'
||'Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.','type_93999_64.png',NULL,1,200.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,801,4,21075,515,'Siege Module',7,'Module',80.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,33400,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship''s propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.'||X'0a0a'
||'This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship''s overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel''s weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges. '||X'0a0a'
||'As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.'||X'0a0a'
||'In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.'||X'0a0a'
||'Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.'||X'0a0a'
||'Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.','type_93999_64.png',NULL,1,200.0,NULL,NULL,1.0,801,4,21075,515,'Siege Module',7,'Module',80.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,33400,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93306,'Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','Rourke’s Tempest','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.','type_639_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,103200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,250.0,150.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','势力特属','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93307,'Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.','type_11139_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,98400000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,188.0,264.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','势力特属','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93309,'Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','Ruud’s Vindicator','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.','type_3827_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,470000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,280.0,280.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','监察官','战列舰','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93336,'Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','Rurik’s Raven','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.','type_638_64.png',NULL,0,1040000.0,NULL,665.0,103600000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,24.0,20.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','势力特属','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93337,'Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.','type_640_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,97100000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,250.0,170.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','加达里合众国','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93338,'Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','Thorrun’s Machariel','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracised her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.','type_11898_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,470000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,250.0,40.0,80.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','天使','战列舰','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93451,'Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','Babout’s Hyperion','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.','type_3706_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,100200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,264.0,188.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','盖伦特联邦','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93452,'Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.','type_35816_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,105200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,170.0,250.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','艾玛帝国','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93453,'Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','Talman’s Bhaalgorn','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.','type_3825_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,470000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,180.0,170.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','监察官','战列舰','faction_500021.png');

||'Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.','type_627_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11280000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,18.0,18.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');

||'Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.','type_9960_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,10850000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,18.0,0.0,18.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','艾玛帝国','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93488,'Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','Ruud’s Vigilant','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.','type_10287_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,9830000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,18.0,18.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','天蛇','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93489,'Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','Rourke’s Rupture','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.','type_629_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,12200000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,10.0,12.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','米玛塔尔共和国','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93490,'Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.','type_9983_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11280000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,25.0,25.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','盖伦特联邦','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93491,'Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','Thorrun’s Cynabal','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracized her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.','type_10018_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,9047000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,40.0,40.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','天使','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93492,'Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.','type_9984_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,9700000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,18.0,18.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','盖伦特联邦','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93493,'Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','Oran’s Arbitrator','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.','type_628_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11200000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,18.0,18.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','艾玛帝国','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93494,'Talman’s Ashimmu','Talman’s Ashimmu','Talman’s Ashimmu','Talman’s Ashimmu','Talman’s Ashimmu','Talman’s Ashimmu','Talman’s Ashimmu','Talman’s Ashimmu','Talman’s Ashimmu','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.','type_22657_64.png',NULL,0,115000.0,NULL,400.0,11010000.0,NULL,1,0,5097,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,18.0,18.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','巡洋舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93495,'Babout’s Incursus','Babout’s Incursus','Babout’s Incursus','Babout’s Incursus','Babout’s Incursus','Babout’s Incursus','Babout’s Incursus','Babout’s Incursus','Babout’s Incursus','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.','type_594_64.png',NULL,0,29500.0,NULL,165.0,1028000.0,NULL,1,0,5098,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,0.0,10.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','盖伦特联邦','护卫舰','faction_500021.png');

||'Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.','type_589_64.png',NULL,0,29500.0,NULL,165.0,1090000.0,NULL,1,0,5098,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,10.0,10.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','护卫舰','faction_500021.png');

||'Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.','type_3762_64.png',NULL,0,29500.0,NULL,165.0,1080000.0,NULL,1,0,5098,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,10.0,10.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','米玛塔尔共和国','护卫舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93498,'Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','Rurik’s Merlin','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.','type_603_64.png',NULL,0,29500.0,NULL,165.0,997000.0,NULL,1,0,5098,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,10.0,0.0,0.0,10.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','护卫舰','faction_500021.png');

||'Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, disabling the sentry.','type_16689_64.png',NULL,0,1000.0,NULL,NULL,1000.0,NULL,1,0,319,'大型可撞击的建筑',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,60.0,60.0,60.0,60.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','其他','岗哨','faction_500021.png');

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93592,'Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Warpath Operational Intel','Intel about operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through active participation in military activities.'||X'0a0a'
||'This intel is of value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders.'||X'0a0a'
||'Quartermaster Traders locations:'||X'0a'
||'<b>Amarr: </b>Amarr, Gergish, Tahs-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Caldari: </b>New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Gallente: </b>Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Minmatar: </b>Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.','type_93592_64.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,0.1,3837,1,27466,1194,'特别版商品',63,'特别版用品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

||'Quartermaster Traders locations:'||X'0a'
||'<b>Amarr: </b>Amarr, Gergish, Tahs-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Caldari: </b>New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Gallente: </b>Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent.'||X'0a'
||'<b>Minmatar: </b>Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.','type_93593_64.png',NULL,1,0.1,NULL,NULL,0.1,3837,1,27467,1194,'特别版商品',63,'特别版用品',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL);

INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93626,'Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','Oran’s Apocalypse','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.','type_642_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,100200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,264.0,188.0,0.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','任务通用','战列舰','faction_500021.png');
INSERT INTO types(type_id,name,de_name,en_name,es_name,fr_name,ja_name,ko_name,ru_name,zh_name,description,icon_filename,bpc_icon_filename,published,volume,repackaged_volume,capacity,mass,marketGroupID,metaGroupID,iconID,groupID,group_name,categoryID,category_name,pg_need,cpu_need,rig_cost,em_damage,them_damage,kin_damage,exp_damage,high_slot,mid_slot,low_slot,rig_slot,gun_slot,miss_slot,variationParentTypeID,process_size,npc_ship_scene,npc_ship_faction,npc_ship_type,npc_ship_faction_icon) VALUES(93627,'Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue','An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.'||X'0a0a'
||'After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group''s thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.','type_15327_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,103200000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,250.0,150.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','米玛塔尔共和国','战列舰','faction_500021.png');

||'Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. Now they work as a mercenary to earn the money they need to build up their own totalitarian dictatorship “the right way”, without mind control.','type_2845_64.png',NULL,0,486000.0,NULL,235.0,470000.0,NULL,1,0,5096,'Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,0.0,170.0,250.0,0.0,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','萨沙共和国','战列舰','faction_500021.png');

If any unauthorized ships venture too close, the Master Security Node is programmed to trigger a site Lockdown.'||X'0a0a'
||'Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, aborting an active Lockdown.','type_3491_64.png',NULL,0,NULL,NULL,2700.0,10000.0,NULL,1,0,306,'可重生的货柜',11,'空间实体',NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,NULL,1,'其他','监察官','其他','faction_500021.png');
